allow: Bash(npx tsx -e "import { createApp } from ''./src/app.js''; const app = createApp\(\); console.log\(''app created ok''\)")
Bash(npx tsx -e "import contacts from ''./src/routes/contacts.ts''; console.log\(''contacts imported ok, type:'', typeof contacts\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Total: {d.get\(""total"",len\(d.get\(""data"",[]\)\)\)} Leads''\)" echo "=== APPOINTMENTS ===")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Total: {d.get\(""total"",len\(d.get\(""data"",[]\)\)\)} Termine''\)" echo "=== DEALS ===")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Total: {d.get\(""total"",len\(d.get\(""data"",[]\)\)\)} Angebote''\)" echo "=== PROJECTS ===")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Total: {len\(d.get\(""data"",[]\)\)} Projekte''\)" echo "=== TASKS ===")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Total: {d.get\(""total"",0\)} Aufgaben''\)" echo "=== USERS ===")

Bash(npx tsx -e "console.log\(''start''\); import\(''./src/routes/auth.js''\).then\(m => {console.log\(''ok'', Object.keys\(m\)\); process.exit\(0\)}\).catch\(e => {console.error\(''err'', e.message\); process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const { execSync } = require\(''child_process''\); try { execSync\(''lsof -ti:3001'', { encoding: ''utf8'' }\); console.log\(''Server already running on 3001''\); } catch { console.log\(''Need to start server''\); }")

Bash(node -pe 'const d=JSON.parse\(require\(""fs""\).readFileSync\(0,""utf8""\)\); console.log\(""Total:"", d.pagination?.total\); \(d.data||[]\).forEach\(a => console.log\(a.id?.slice\(0,8\), ""|"", a.contactName, ""|"", ""assigned:"", a.assignedTo?.slice\(0,8\), ""|"", a.status\)\)')
Bash(node -pe 'const d=JSON.parse\(require\(""fs""\).readFileSync\(0,""utf8""\)\); JSON.stringify\({token: d.data?.token?.slice\(0,20\), userId: d.data?.user?.id}, null, 2\)')
